fills: Tabel 4.11 (L4 structure-class taxonomy: predicted vs observed dimension activation + transfer activation per dataset structure-class)
PROVENANCE_AND_SCOPE_WARNING: Source: research_validation/reports/adc_l4_reveal/l4_reveal_results.json. This is a PREREGISTERED-PREDICTION vs OBSERVED comparison over 4 cross-dataset structure-class profiles (assistments_2015_skill, csedm_f19, ednet_kt1, junyi_2015) — it is NOT computed on run-d2154070 (the seal); it is the L4 cross-dataset reveal. The assistments_2009_skill prediction row exists in preregistered_predictions but has NO observed_profiles entry (UNAVAILABLE observed — see note). ADC verdicts are robust to the m_K vs 3-learner inheritance (they key on signal presence/dispersion); same governance-inheritance disclosure applies (KALMAN_OVERLAY_GOVERNANCE_SCOPING.md (iii): L4 dormant on flat topologies is driven by DAG incident-edge density, not mastery level -> HOLDS with caveat).

tabel_4_11_predicted_vs_observed._columns: dataset | dimension | predicted | observed | matches | confidence

assistments_2009_skill.reason: preregistered_predictions carries assistments_2009_skill (delta_m=active, transfer_realized=dormant, transfer_prospective=dormant, challenge=active, uncertainty=active, zpd=suppressed) but l4_reveal_results.json has NO observed_profiles / comparisons entry for it -> no observed activation to compare. Not generating it (would require a new ADC profile run).

transfer_activation_summary._note: transfer_realized + transfer_prospective predicted DORMANT for all 5 datasets and observed DORMANT in all 4 datasets that have observed profiles. Transfer dimensions are uniformly inactive across cross-dataset structure classes (consistent with the seal's snapshot where transfer_prospective is a structural zero; transfer_realized is the one snapshot-active dim on the live cohort but DORMANT on these offline cross-datasets because their substrate carries no transfer signal). Per scoping doc, transfer findings are mastery-agnostic (RM4 offline correctness-based) -> HOLDS.

mismatch_analysis.challenge_predicted_active_observed_dorm: 4/4 datasets: challenge predicted active but observed DORMANT (confidence 1.0). The preregistration expected challenge to carry signal on these datasets; observed it does not (no substrate variance on the offline cross-dataset replays). This is the single most consistent miss (all 4).
mismatch_analysis.zpd_predicted_suppressed_observed_active: 2/4 datasets (assistments_2015_skill, junyi_2015): zpd predicted suppressed but observed ACTIVE. zpd was active everywhere observed; the suppression prediction failed on the two flatter-topology datasets. Per scoping (iii), zpd/L4 dormancy keys on DAG incident-edge density; borderline cases can shift -> these 2 misses are the predicted-borderline cases.
mismatch_analysis.perfect_predictions: csedm_f19 and ednet_kt1 = 5/6 each (only challenge missed); assistments_2015_skill and junyi_2015 = 4/6 (challenge + zpd missed).
mismatch_analysis.robustness_note: Per KALMAN_OVERLAY_GOVERNANCE_SCOPING.md, Tabel 4.11 L4 verdicts are ADC-verdict-derived -> DEPENDS/likely-unchanged under the m_K vs 3-learner inheritance; the activation classes key on incident-edge density and substrate variance, not on absolute mastery level.
